query_text: stiff, damp, on-piste ski available in 180cm or longer

results.explanation: Head Supershape e-Speed excels in: stiffness, damp. Review: "Stiff but manageable for strong intermediates." Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing but not quite race-level demanding." Review: "Incredibly damp — the smoothest ride on hardpack I've found."
K2 Mindbender 108Ti excels in: stiffness, damp. Review: "The titanal makes it stiff and damp" Review: "Stiff, damp, and incredibly stable at speed." Review: "elite-level dampness and stability."

Nordica Enforcer 100 excels in: stiffness, damp. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing." Review: "The stiffness and dampness are impressive for an all-mountain ski." Review: "The titanal makes it damp and stable at speed."

Salomon QST 106 excels in: damp. Solid on: stiffness. Review: "Not as stable as heavier chargers in high-speed chop." Review: "The carbon construction keeps weight down" Review: "Carbon and flax construction gives it a unique damp but lively feel."
Line Blade excels in: stiffness, damp. Review: "Stiff flex" Review: "stiff but not brutal" Review: "unique combo of liveliness and dampness."

Dynastar M-Free 108 excels in: damp. Solid on: stiffness. Review: "Not as stiff as the Mindbender but more playful." Review: "Not as demanding as the K2 Mindbender but still rewards good technique." Review: "Titanal construction gives good dampness."
Solid on: stiffness, damp. Review: "Not as damp as heavier titanal skis." Review: "Not a hard charger but that's not me anyway." Review: "Good at everything."
